name: panviz
description: Static publication-oriented sequence tube map renderer.

devNotes.runtime: The checked-in browser bundle under harness/dist contains the bundled D3-based Panviz core. Runtime SVG/PNG/PDF export uses the local node_modules/playwright-core copy.
devNotes.fullDevInstall: When network/package installation is allowed, add the full build dependencies such as d3, d3-selection-multi, deep-equal, webpack, and webpack-cli, then generate package-lock.json with npm install/npm ci.
